bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid. The opponent’s opening offer gives me low utility and shows no concession pattern yet, so I will counter with my strongest values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a near-maximal utility bid while making only a tiny concession to avoid simply repeating my previous offer. The opponent’s two offers are both very low utility for me and their second offer is not an improvement, so there is no evidence yet that they are conceding toward my priorities.

I am still targeting a very high-utility bid because it is only t=0.04, and the opponent’s offers remain far from acceptable despite a small concession on issueC. Since issueD has low importance to me and the opponent has varied it, I am making a limited concession there while holding firm on my high-weight issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.855 weighted utility because it is still very early at t=0.06, so there is little need for major concessions yet. The opponent has only made very low-utility offers for me and has conceded only slightly on issueC/issueD, so I will keep my strongest positions on the high-weight issues while varying a lower-weight issue to avoid repeating my last bid exactly.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while varying from my previous offer. The opponent’s offers remain very low utility for me and show little reliable concession, so I will hold firm on high-weight issueA, issueB, and issueC while making only a small concession on the lower-weight issueD.

At t=0.10 it is still early, and the opponent’s offers remain very low-utility for me with only minor variation rather than meaningful concession. I am keeping my high-weight issues A, B, and C at my preferred values, while making a modest concession on low-weight issueE to a value the opponent has repeatedly signaled.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.83 since it is still very early at t=0.12, but I am making a modest concession on lower-weight issueD while holding firm on high-weight issueA, issueB, and issueC. The opponent’s offers are still low for me, though their latest bid concedes issueC to my top value, so I am reciprocating slightly without giving up my most important issues.

At t=0.14 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only small concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and mostly push valueE/valueD, so I am holding firm on my most important issues A, B, and C while varying D/E to avoid repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a still-high utility bid by holding firm on my most important issues (issueA, issueB, and issueC) while conceding on lower-weight issues. At t=0.16 it is still early, but the opponent has consistently pushed valueE/valueD on issueD and issueE, so I am using those as tradeoff concessions without sacrificing core value.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 because it is early in the negotiation, so I should not concede on high-weight issues yet. The opponent’s offers remain low for me but they have repeatedly shown willingness around issueC:valueB and often use issueD/issueE values like valueD/valueE, so I concede mainly on the lower-weight issues D and E while holding issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.75 while conceding mainly on the low-weight issues issueD and issueE. At t=0.20 it is still early, so I am holding firm on the high-importance issueA, issueB, and issueC, especially since the opponent’s offers remain low for me and mostly concede only intermittently on issueC. Their latest bid uses issueD:valueE and issueE:valueD, so I am mirroring those lower-cost concessions without giving up my core priorities.

At t=0.22 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions mainly on my lower-weight issues. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and mostly signal preference for valueE/valueD, so I will hold firm on high-importance issueA, issueB, and issueC while conceding issueD and issueE toward their apparent pattern.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.75 because it is early-mid negotiation at t=0.24, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly held issueA/issueB at low values for me but has recently offered issueC: valueB, which is my top value there; I will hold firm on high-weight issueA, issueB, and issueC while conceding on lower-weight issueD/issueE in line with their latest bid.

At t=0.26 I am still targeting a strong utility around 0.76, since the opponent’s offers remain very low for me and show only limited concession on my high-weight issues. I will hold firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC, while varying/conceding lower-weight issueD and issueE to avoid repeating my last exact bid and keep room for agreement.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.77 because it is only t=0.28, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s latest offer finally conceded issueA to my best value, but they continue to push hard on issueB and low-weight issues issueD/issueE, so I will hold firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC while conceding issueD and issueE to values they have repeatedly offered.

At t=0.30 I am still targeting a strong utility bid while making concessions mainly on my lowest-weight issues, issueD and issueE. The opponent’s offers remain low for me and only show limited movement, so I am holding firm on the high-importance issues A, B, and C while changing the low-weight terms to avoid repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a solid utility around 0.77 by holding my most important issues, especially issueA, issueB, and issueC, while conceding on lower-weight issueD and issueE. At t=0.32 there is some time pressure but not enough to make major concessions; the opponent’s latest bid improved on issueB and issueC but still keeps pushing low-value outcomes for my side on several issues. With no messages, I rely only on the offer pattern and make a tradeoff-oriented counteroffer.

At t=0.34 I am targeting a still-profitable utility around 0.70 while making a clearer mid-game concession than my prior high-utility offers. The opponent’s offers have improved slightly for me, especially on issueA/issueC and occasionally issueB, while they repeatedly seem to favor valueE on issueD and issueE, so I concede those lower-weight issues and soften issueB while holding firm on my most important issueA and preferred issueC.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.67: still protecting my highest-weight issueA and valuable issueC, while conceding on lower-weight issueD and issueE. At t=0.36 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s low-utility pattern; their recent offers suggest they may tolerate issueA/valueB and issueC/valueB, but they continue to push hard on issueB/valueE and low-value D/E outcomes, so I am offering a compromise on issueB and the lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a moderate-high utility around 0.69: holding firm on my most important issues issueA=valueA and issueC=valueB, while conceding on lower-weight issueD/issueE and partially on issueB. The opponent’s recent offers have improved substantially for me, especially the last one matching my top choices on issueA and issueC, so at t=0.38 I can make a constructive concession without dropping too close to reservation value.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.69, keeping my highest-weight issues A and C at their best values while conceding more on lower-weight D/E and moderately on B. The opponent has occasionally offered strong values on issueA and issueC but still pushes low value on issueB, so I am holding B at valueB rather than dropping to their preferred-looking valueE yet. At t=0.40 there is time to continue bargaining without accepting their much lower last offer.

I am targeting a solid mid-game utility around 0.71, preserving my highest-weight priorities on issueA and issueC while making moderate concessions on issueB, issueD, and issueE. At t=0.42 there is time pressure to move toward overlap, and the opponent’s latest bid signaled possible interest in issueB:valueC, issueD:valueC, and issueE:valueE, so I incorporate those without giving up my core values.

At t=0.44 we are in the mid-game, so I am conceding on lower-weight issues D and E while still protecting high-value issueA and issueC. The opponent has started moving on issueA and issueB but still often offers poor values on issueC, so I will hold issueC at my top value while making a more acceptable package than my earlier maximal bids.
